title: Martin Bauer
text: Home * People * Martin Bauer Martin Bauer , a German computer scientist and software developer. Graduated from University of Tübingen , he is executive and co-founder of the IT service provider Bauer & Schweitzer GbR [1] [2] . While interested in computer chess and games during the early 2000s, Martin Bauer ported Steinwender's and Donninger's Basic program Minimax to Delphi , made it compliant to the UCI protocol, and further enhanced it as DelphiMax . Martin further distributed his shareware chess tournament management program Chessworks [3] .
